description.value:
Receive Medication prescription vrije-tekst building blocks for patient G. XXX_Hess
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_testgegevens_voorschrift_ontvangen
Original description: TEST Scenarioset 7 vrije tekst product Vrije tekst product
Receive Medication prescription vrije-tekst resources in a transaction Bundle
Test server to handle a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationRequest).where(((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(system = 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-NullFlavor' and code = 'OTH'))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationRequest).where(((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(system = 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-NullFlavor' and code = 'OTH'))).count() = 1

description.value: Confirm that the response Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code 'OTH|http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-NullFlavor' (anders)
